rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §33.0205, which concerns construction of instructional material subchapter provisions.
quote: Nothing in this subchapter may be construed as limiting the acquisition of instructional material, as defined by Section 31.002, necessary for the teaching of, instruction in, or demonstration of knowledge of the essential knowledge and skills adopted under Section 28.002.
_note: No conflict; rule text addresses instructional materials, unrelated to homestead exemptions.
